title: LLM Observability, Evaluation, Experimentation Platform — Dat Ngo, Arize
summary: Arize Phoenix is an open source LLM observability, evaluation, and experimentation platform that runs as a single container. The enterprise product includes an AI layer called Alex that automatically scans traces, surfaces issues, and creates evaluations.
